description_long: This is a modern double bed featuring a sleek, black platform frame with clean, straight lines and a tall, solid headboard. The bed is topped with a thick, light gray mattress and two white pillows, both neatly arranged against the headboard. A plush, gray comforter with a white grid pattern covers the mattress, draping slightly over the sides and foot of the bed. The frame appears to be constructed from wood or engineered wood, providing a sturdy base for the bedding. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors or modern living spaces. The bed's proportions suggest it is designed for two people, offering ample sleeping space.
description: A modern double bed with a black platform frame, tall headboard, and a gray grid-patterned comforter. Two white pillows and a thick mattress complete its minimalist, urban look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall headboard, two pillows, and the comforter draping over the right side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the bed, both pillows, and the symmetrical drape of the comforter.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the headboard on the right, showing the comforter draping over the left side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the solid, tall headboard and the top of the comforter.
